label_content.header_line: DANGER: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.

rendering.svg_content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100mm" height="75mm" viewBox="0 0 100 75"><title>Arc-Flash Label per BS 5499 - MSB-1 (verified, non-provisional)</title><rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="12" fill="#E00034" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/><text x="50" y="8" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">DANGER</text><g transform="translate(2, 14)"><polygon points="10,2 18,16 2,16" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M 8 5 L 12 9 L 9 9 L 13 14 L 9 11 L 11 11 L 8 6 Z" fill="#000000"/></g><text x="22" y="18" font-family="Arial" font-size="3" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">Arc Flash and Shock Hazard</text><text x="22" y="22" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Equipment: MSB-1</text><text x="22" y="26" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Voltage: 400 V AC, 3-phase</text><text x="22" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Incident Energy: 9.8 cal/cm² @ 455mm</text><text x="22" y="34" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Arc Flash Boundary: 1650 mm (65 in)</text><text x="22" y="42" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">PPE Cat 3</text><text x="22" y="47" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.8" fill="#000000">AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.</text><line x1="0" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="2" y="62" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.6" fill="#000000">Method: IEEE 1584-2018 (verified) | QR: https://buildtech.example/labels/MSB-1</text><text x="2" y="65" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.4" fill="#000000">Analysed 2026-05-25 | BuildTech Engineering Ltd</text></svg>

label_content.header_line: WARNING: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: AR shirt + trousers OR coverall (ATPV ≥8 cal/cm²); AR hood; safety glasses; hard hat; rubber + leather gloves.

rendering.svg_content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100mm" height="75mm" viewBox="0 0 100 75"><title>Arc-Flash Label per BS 5499 - MSB-1.DB-L1 (verified, non-provisional)</title><rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="12" fill="#F28900" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/><text x="50" y="8" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">WARNING</text><g transform="translate(2, 14)"><polygon points="10,2 18,16 2,16" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M 8 5 L 12 9 L 9 9 L 13 14 L 9 11 L 11 11 L 8 6 Z" fill="#000000"/></g><text x="22" y="18" font-family="Arial" font-size="3" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">Arc Flash and Shock Hazard</text><text x="22" y="22" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Equipment: MSB-1.DB-L1</text><text x="22" y="26" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Voltage: 400 V AC, 3-phase</text><text x="22" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Incident Energy: 5.2 cal/cm² @ 455mm</text><text x="22" y="34" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Arc Flash Boundary: 1050 mm (41 in)</text><text x="22" y="42" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">PPE Cat 2</text><text x="22" y="47" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.8" fill="#000000">AR shirt + trousers OR coverall (ATPV ≥8 cal/cm²); AR hood; safety glasses; hard hat; rubber + leather gloves.</text><line x1="0" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="2" y="62" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.6" fill="#000000">Method: IEEE 1584-2018 (verified) | QR: https://buildtech.example/labels/MSB-1.DB-L1</text><text x="2" y="65" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.4" fill="#000000">Analysed 2026-05-25 | BuildTech Engineering Ltd</text></svg>

provenance.provenance_note: Upstream arc-flash IE values verified using IEEE 1584-2018 600V VCB coefficients (Sprint A.3 transcription). Both nodes (MSB-1 IE = 9.8 cal/cm²; MSB-1.DB-L1 IE = 5.2 cal/cm²) sit well below the 40 cal/cm² RESTRICTED ceiling. Provenance.is_provisional = false → DRAFT marker SUPPRESSED on label header_line. Labels approved for OPERATIONAL FIELD USE per BS 5499-4:2013 + BS EN ISO 7010 + NFPA 70E:2024 §130.5(H). Engineer attestation: James Morrison, BSc CEng — RECS 456789.

assumptions: arc-flash intent consumed from electrical/arc-flash/examples/uk-lv-switchgear/intent-out.json (post Sprint A.3 refresh)
Upstream IE values verified non-provisional: IEEE 1584-2018 600V VCB coefficients applied (no Lee 1982 fallback)
provenance.is_provisional = FALSE → header_line carries pure 'DANGER:' / 'WARNING:' wording (no 'DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE' marker)
QR codes populated because qr_code_base_url present: <base>/<node_id> pattern per rules/label-content-population.yaml
BS 5499-4:2013 + BS EN ISO 7010 format auto-selected for GB jurisdiction; signal-word vocabulary aligned with ANSI Z535.4 §6.2 incident-energy thresholds
tool_call_pending_for_pdf_png: true on both labels — SVG content rendered inline, PDF/PNG conversion deferred to calc.render_label runtime tool

rationale.chat_summary: UK 400V commercial facility — NON-PROVISIONAL label set. Consumes refreshed uk-lv-switchgear arc-flash intent (post Sprint A.3 IEEE 1584-2018 600V VCB coefficient transcription). provenance.is_provisional = FALSE; DRAFT marker SUPPRESSED on both labels. 2 nodes: MSB-1 (Cat 3 / DANGER / IE 9.8) + MSB-1.DB-L1 (Cat 2 / WARNING / IE 5.2). Both well below 40 cal/cm² RESTRICTED ceiling. QR codes populated. Labels approved for FIELD USE.

sections.title: Input Ingestion + Provenance Resolution
sections.summary: Consumed arc-flash intent from refreshed uk-lv-switchgear example. Upstream calculation_meta.is_provisional = false (post Sprint A.3 IEEE 1584-2018 600V VCB coefficient verification). Resolved provenance block populated with method_applied = ieee_1584_2018, calc_tool_version = arc-flash@1.1.0, is_provisional = FALSE.

decisions.label: Provenance set to NON-PROVISIONAL
decisions.summary: Upstream IE values computed using verified IEEE 1584-2018 coefficients — no Lee 1982 fallback, no pending coefficients
decisions.code_clause: Sprint A.2 schema-level provenance block + C2 cause-fix

sections.title: Jurisdictional Format Selection
sections.summary: GB jurisdiction → BS 5499-4:2013 baseline (BS EN ISO 7010 symbols + English signal words). Both labels format_applied = bs_5499.

sections.title: Header-Line Construction — DRAFT Marker SUPPRESSED
sections.summary: Because provenance.is_provisional = FALSE, the header_line carries pure 'DANGER: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD' / 'WARNING: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD' wording. NO 'DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE' prefix. This is the OPERATIONAL FIELD-USE path of the provenance disclosure mechanism — the counterpart to the existing uk-bs5499-label-set example where is_provisional = true emits the DRAFT marker.

decisions.label: Header-line DRAFT marker omitted
decisions.summary: is_provisional = false → header_line starts with signal word directly; no DRAFT prefix
decisions.code_clause: Sprint A.2 C2 cause-fix: provenance block governs DRAFT marker emission

sections.title: Signal-Word Distribution
sections.summary: 1 DANGER (MSB-1 Cat 3, IE 9.8 cal/cm²) + 1 WARNING (MSB-1.DB-L1 Cat 2, IE 5.2 cal/cm²). Both consistent with PPE Cat ↔ signal_word mapping per validator.md INV-04.

decisions.label: DANGER for Cat 3
decisions.summary: PPE Category 3 maps to DANGER per signal_word_assignment rule

decisions.label: WARNING for Cat 2
decisions.summary: PPE Category 2 maps to WARNING per signal_word_assignment rule

sections.title: QR Code Emission
sections.summary: qr_code_base_url = 'https://buildtech.example/labels' supplied. Per rules/label-content-population.yaml: when base URL present, emit qr_code_url = <base>/<node_id>. MSB-1 → https://buildtech.example/labels/MSB-1. MSB-1.DB-L1 → https://buildtech.example/labels/MSB-1.DB-L1.

sections.title: RESTRICTED Branch Status
sections.summary: Both nodes' IE values (9.8 and 5.2 cal/cm²) sit well below the 40 cal/cm² RESTRICTED ceiling. No node triggers signal_word = RESTRICTED. Companion example intl-hv-restricted-substation exercises the IE > 40 RESTRICTED branch on the upstream arc-flash skill.

sections.title: Compliance + Field-Use Approval
sections.summary: Compliant. No non-compliance flags. Provenance verified non-provisional. Labels approved for OPERATIONAL FIELD USE — they may be printed and affixed to equipment. PDF/PNG conversion is the only remaining step, deferred to calc.render_label runtime tool.

sections.title: Project Label Index
sections.summary: 2 labels total. All BS-5499. 1 DANGER + 1 WARNING. No RESTRICTED. QR codes populated for both. PDF schedule generation deferred.

invariants.evidence: Both labels[].node_id values (MSB-1, MSB-1.DB-L1) match ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9.\-]{0,63}$ and are unique across labels[].
PPE Cat ↔ signal_word consistency holds at both nodes: MSB-1 (Cat 3 → DANGER), MSB-1.DB-L1 (Cat 2 → WARNING). Neither IE value exceeds 40 cal/cm² so neither requires RESTRICTED.

All NFPA 70E §130.5(H) required content fields populated at both labels: header_line, equipment_id, nominal_voltage, incident_energy_at_working_distance, arc_flash_boundary, analysis_date, ppe_category all non-empty. No 'Not computed' placeholders.

Both rendering.svg_content values exceed 50 chars, contain '<svg' opening and '</svg>' closing tags, and contain no remaining {{...}} template placeholders. Inline SVG populated; PDF/PNG conversion remains pending per INV-07.
Intent shape validates against labels-intent.schema.json. 1-to-1 mapping with IR labels[]: 2 entries in IR, 2 entries in intent.labels[], matched by node_id (MSB-1, MSB-1.DB-L1).

Provenance block populated per C2 cause-fix schema requirement: method_applied=ieee_1584_2018, computed_at='2026-05-25T11:00:00Z', calc_tool_version='shared/calculations/electrical/arc-flash@1.1.0', is_provisional=false, provenance_note explains Sprint A.3 verification rationale. is_provisional=false implies DRAFT marker SUPPRESSED on label header_line — verified by absence of 'DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE' substring in either label's header_line field.
